functionalities:
- User sees job header with company logo, title, location, salary and sponsorship status
  ***acceptance tests***
  - Shows company logo, job title, "Sponsorship: Active" green pill, location, employment type and salary.

- User sees AI VERDICT section with detailed match analysis
  ***acceptance tests***
  - Large green "Strong Apply" text with 92% overall match score.
  - Shows Interview Chance (64%) and Offer Chance (14%) with green arrows.
  - Circular progress indicator displays the overall match percentage.

- Skills Match section displays alignment with the job
  ***acceptance tests***
  - Shows horizontal progress bars for Financial Analysis (100%), Excel (90%), Data Analysis (80%), PowerPoint (70%).
  - "View all requirements" link is present.

- Action buttons are available at the bottom of the review
  ***acceptance tests***
  - Red "Reject" button, "Save for later", "Outreach" and dark green "One-Click Apply" button are visible.
  - One-Click Apply button has a sparkle icon and "AI will generate your application" text.
